title: Extreme Ores
description: Gain 37+ More Ores In Your World!
body:
Uncover a world of elemental power, rare gems, and ancient forces beneath your feet.

More Ores is an expansive Minecraft mod that adds 17 brand-new ores to your world generation, each with its own unique traits, uses, and magical potential. Whether you're exploring the overworld, diving into the depths of the Nether, or soaring through the End, there's always something new to discover.

🌌 Featured Ores:

Aetherite – A rare celestial metal imbued with ethereal energy. Ideal for high-tier tools and gear.

Blazestone – Born of Nether fire, perfect for crafting heat-based weapons or powering furnaces.

Crysolite – A radiant green gem found deep underground. Can be used for advanced enchantments.

Luminite – Emits a soft glow. Used for light-infused gear and building materials.

Nocturine – A dark, shadowy ore that boosts stealth and night-based abilities.

Solaris Crystal – Harness the power of the sun! Enhances solar-themed tools and armor.

Glaciorite – A frostbound gem, ideal for crafting gear that slows enemies or resists fire.

Duskshard – A twilight-colored crystal with temporal properties—perfect for unique effects.

Volucite – A lightweight, buoyant mineral. Used in levitation or anti-gravity tech.

Ferrigem – A dense, iron-infused gem. Great for hybrid metal-gem tools.

Zephyrite – Wind-aligned and swift. Adds speed effects and lightness to equipment.

Draconite – Rumored to be from dragon hoards. Grants power boosts and enchantment synergy.

Mythraline – A mythic blue ore with unmatched magical conductivity.

Thundrium – Crackling with electric energy. Excellent for redstone enhancements or shock weapons.

Umbracite – A void-touched ore, perfect for dark magic and Ender-related tech.

Embercrystal – Smolders eternally. Use it for persistent fire or lava-based contraptions.

Moonveil – A shimmering lunar gem with effects that change based on moon phase.
